channel.title: Vasileios Paschalidis on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Vasileios Paschalidis on Gabriele Bozzola's Homepage

item.title: Initial data for general relativistic simulations of multiple electrically charged black holes with linear and angular momenta
item.description: We apply the Bowen-York formalism to generate initial data for charged black-hole systems.
